# Apollo Advanced Medical Center

> Apollo Advanced Medical Center is a medical, dental, aesthetic, laser, facial skin care, and body-contouring clinic in Al Rigga, near Union in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

## Key Information

- Website: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/
- Address: BA1 Mezzanine floor, Bin Jarsh Building, near Fish Roundabout, Al Rigga, Union, Dubai, UAE
- Phone: +971 4 286 4876
- WhatsApp: +971 52 892 0301
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 9:00 AM-11:00 PM; Sunday closed
- Appointment: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/appointment/
- Contact and map: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/contact-us/

## Primary Pages

- About the clinic: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/about-us/
- Services: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/services/
- Doctors and therapists: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/doctors/
- Health and wellness guides: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/blog/

## Service Pages

- Dental services: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/services/dental-services/
- Aesthetic and beauty services: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/services/aesthetic-beauty-services/
- Laser hair removal: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/services/laser-hair-removal/
- Facial and skin care: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/services/facial-skin-care/
- Slimming and body contouring: https://apolloadvancemedicalcenter.com/services/slimming-body-contouring/

Information on this website is general and does not replace an assessment by a qualified healthcare professional.
